code:
import os
import stat

def check_file_permissions(filepath):
    permissions = {
        "owner_read": False,
        "owner_write": False,
        "owner_execute": False,
        "group_read": False,
        "group_write": False,
        "group_execute": False,
        "others_read": False,
        "others_write": False,
        "others_execute": False,
        "error": None
    }
    try:
        stat_info = os.stat(filepath)
        mode = stat_info.st_mode

        permissions["owner_read"] = bool(mode & stat.S_IRUSR)
        permissions["owner_write"] = bool(mode & stat.S_IWUSR)
        permissions["owner_execute"] = bool(mode & stat.S_IXUSR)

        permissions["group_read"] = bool(mode & stat.S_IRGRP)
        permissions["group_write"] = bool(mode & stat.S_IWGRP)
        permissions["group_execute"] = bool(mode & stat.S_IXGRP)

        permissions["others_read"] = bool(mode & stat.S_IROTH)
        permissions["others_write"] = bool(mode & stat.S_IWOTH)
        permissions["others_execute"] = bool(mode & stat.S_IXOTH)

    except FileNotFoundError:
        permissions["error"] = "Dosya bulunamadı."
    except PermissionError:
        permissions["error"] = "Dosyaya erişim izni yok."
    except Exception as e:
        permissions["error"] = f"Bir hata oluştu: {e}"

    return permissions
prompt: Dosya izinlerini kontrol eden fonksiyon yaz.
